rationale: Each page now includes one extra item — the first item of the next page. Pages overlap by one element, which corrupts any downstream consumer that joins or de-dups by page. Modal `major` (a correctness bug visible to every caller). `minor` is the floor (some callers do downstream dedup), `major` is the ceiling — not `critical` (no security boundary) and not `info` (this is a real defect, not a style nit).
